issues_found: Source is a raw data series snapshot with no analytical content, policy interpretation, or substantive commentary
No new information: IORB rate flat at 3.65% with no change signals or policy implications
Quality tier self-assessed as Tier 3 - Data Point with limited research archive value beyond establishing current rate level
Archive value is marginal for a research archive if the intent is substantive research documents rather than data reference points
human_review_reason: Source is factually accurate and well-documented, but presents a borderline case: (1) it's a raw data snapshot with zero analytical value, (2) no policy changes or new information is present, (3) only establishes current IORB level at 3.65%, and (4) any researcher could retrieve this directly from FRED. However, it is technically relevant to market structure and does provide accurate rate data with context about IORB's role. The record itself is honest about the limited archival value. Human review needed to determine if this archive accepts raw data snapshots or requires more substantive research documents.
